notes: Uses 2025 Fort Hills total cash operating cost per barrel.
Uses Q4 2025 Fort Hills total cash operating cost per barrel as an improved-cost case.
Uses Q2 2025 Fort Hills total cash operating cost per barrel as a stressed-cost case.
Uses 2025 Oil Sands non-upgraded bitumen price realization.
Uses 2025 weighted average Oil Sands price realization.
Uses Canadian Natural mining/upgrading cost comparison from Reuters/BOE.
If margin exceeds this threshold, continued productivity investment is treated as more attractive.
If margin is positive but below the high threshold, selective or maintenance-focused investment is preferred.
If margin is near zero or negative, redirecting marginal capital is preferred.
